description_long: This is a rectangular, softcover book with a predominantly black cover featuring a modern, digital-style illustration. The cover art shows a person in light blue clothing holding a large green puzzle piece, fitting it into a larger puzzle, set against a subtle zodiac wheel background. The design is visually striking, with bold white and green text and a clean, professional layout. The book appears to be of standard thickness, suggesting a typical paperback format. Contact information and branding elements are visible along the bottom edge. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, likely intended to attract readers interested in astrology or horoscope compatibility.
description: A black softcover book with a modern illustration of a person fitting a green puzzle piece, set against a zodiac-themed background. The cover features bold white and green text and a clean, professional design.
description_view_0: The book is seen from a low angle, highlighting the black cover, the green puzzle piece, and the person illustration, with the title text partially visible.
description_view_1: This view shows the book from the opposite side, with the green puzzle piece and person more prominent, and the title text upside down.
description_view_2: The book is viewed from a side angle, emphasizing the bold white title text and the green puzzle piece illustration.
description_view_3: A direct front view displays the entire cover, including the illustration, title, and contact information clearly.
attribute_cover_illustration: The main illustration features a stylized person in light blue clothing holding a large green puzzle piece, fitting it into a larger puzzle. The background includes a faint zodiac wheel, giving the cover a modern, astrological theme. The artwork is digital and clean, with a focus on the puzzle and astrological motifs.
attribute_publisher_logo: A small green circular logo with a geometric pattern is visible in the top right corner of the cover.
